SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JIMMY VONG--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
